name: Bloomreach - Extract and Clean All Emails

content.query:
SELECT
division
,prospect_id
,Email as email_id
,lower(
    case 
    when CHARINDEX(',',cleansedEmail) = 0 then cleansedEmail
    else LEFT(cleansedEmail,CHARINDEX(',',cleansedEmail)-1)
    end
) as Email
FROM 
(
select
lower([Division]) as division
,lower([CustomerID]) as prospect_id
,Email
,replace(
replace(
replace(
    [Email],
    '@,','@'),
    ',com','.com'),
    '.prod','')
cleansedEmail
from
[EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER]
where
Division = 'FHI'
and Email is not null
and len([Email]) > 4
and Email like '%@%'
) cleansedEmails
